title: bursera carana
intro: Bursera carana, also known as the "Cupey tree" or "Gumbo Limbo tree," is a plant species in the family Burseraceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Bursera carana include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. The herbal preparations of Bursera carana include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make medicinal remedies, and the plant's resin is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
